{"id":"sourcerer-xli","title":"LLM Post-Disassembly Analysis Plugin","description":"Working directory: /Users/bryanw/Projects/Vintage/tools/sourcerer
Task packet: .ai/tasks/sourcerer-k48-20260319151625-llm-analysis-plugin/

Add a post-disassembly LLM analysis layer invoking Claude (Anthropic API) to augment AddressMap with improved labels and comments. Follows FormatterRegistry/CpuRegistry plugin pattern.

Scope: LlmAnalyzer interface + LlmAnalyzerRegistry + ClaudeAnalyzer (cpp-httplib + OpenSSL, tool_use annotate_code), --llm-analyze CLI flag, main.cpp integration between label generation and equate generation, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env, graceful degradation, unit tests in tests/test_llm_analyzer.cpp. Full contract and plan in task packet.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"bryan.woodruff@cortexa.com","created_at":"2026-03-19T22:29:17Z","created_by":"Bryan Woodruff","updated_at":"2026-03-19T22:29:17Z"}

{"id":"sourcerer-bwo","title":"LLM Analysis: Extended Review Passes for Source Documentation","description":"Working directory: /Users/bryanw/Projects/Vintage/tools/sourcerer
Task packet: .ai/tasks/sourcerer-a6f-20260319160030-llm-extended-analysis/

Extend ClaudeAnalyzer with 3 additional passes after existing instruction annotation:

PASS 1 - DATA-AS-CODE: DataCodeScanner scans DATA regions with CpuPlugin::Disassemble(). Runs of >=3 valid non-illegal instructions are candidates. LLM confirms via confirm_data_code tool. Annotate with POSSIBLE_CODE comment.

PASS 2 - BYTES-AS-STRINGS: StringScanner finds printable ASCII runs >=4 bytes in DATA regions. Heuristic-only (no LLM). Annotate with ; "text" comment and label suggestion.

PASS 3 - CODE PATTERN RECOGNITION: CodePatternDetector finds subroutines matching: string ops, graphics routines, math (multiply/divide/BCD), memory ops, I/O polling, control structures (dispatch tables, state machines), ISR handlers. LLM confirms and documents via annotate_pattern tool returning function_name + description + key_comments.

Extend LlmAnnotation with AnnotationType enum (INSTRUCTION/STRING_DATA/POSSIBLE_CODE/CODE_PATTERN). Update Analyze() signature to accept binary*, address_map*, cpu*, platform. Full contract and plan in task packet.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"bryan.woodruff@cortexa.com","created_at":"2026-03-19T23:56:53Z","created_by":"Bryan Woodruff","updated_at":"2026-03-19T23:56:53Z"}
